text: I sense a curious anticipation as I enter this dimly-lit, industrial hallway. The faint reflections from glass doors and the hum of fluorescent lights create an air of detachment. Moving forward, the display of "R+D" on a vividly colored wall brings a spark of intellectual excitement. Surrounded by words about research and innovation, I feel drawn into an environment that desires understanding and progress, even if it feels a bit sterile and impersonal. I am both isolated and intrigued, pondering humanity’s relationship with intelligent machines.
